_comment: Round ledger. 'empire' is the IMMEDIATE absorbing empire in that round (per OP post body); the merger forest then chains absorbed empires together. Final per-state empire matches the round-42 visual ground truth. Source codes: body=parsed from OP post body; image=visually verified on round-42; multi=multi-empire split, primary listed.

rounds.note: Initial 50-state map; no elimination. Top comment was a GIF of Florida floating into the ocean — which is why Florida was eliminated in round #2.
Body: 'Florida has been eaten by Georgia and Alabama' — GA primary. (GA's empire is later absorbed by NM in #30, taking FL along.)
Body: 'eaten by surrounding neighbours'. OR (Cascadia) takes the dominant share.
Body: 'eaten by New Mexico, Oklahoma and Louisiana'. Round-5 map shows the TX region in OK's brown, so OK primary. (OK later goes to NM in #19, taking TX along.)
Body: 'South Dakota and North Dakota had a fight to the death... the North'. ND → MN in #12, so SD ultimately MN.
Body: 'demolished by VA, KY, OH, MD and PA'. VA primary by adjacency. (VA → MD in #34.)
Body: 'eaten by its neighbours'. IA primary. (IA → MN in #25.)
Body: 'eaten by its friends in the South'. Round-42 image shows SC region in MD teal — so primary absorber was NC (which → MD in #32), not GA.
Body: 'Arkansas is no more'. MO primary by adjacency. (MO → NM in #15.)
Body: 'Ohio is gone'. Round-11 map shows OH region in MI's medium green.
Body: RI gone, map didn't visibly change. MA primary by adjacency. (MA → VT in #37.)
Body: 'ND sacrificing its landmass to the surrounding states'. MN primary; round-42 shows ND region in MN lime green.
Body: 'New Jersey is gone'. NY primary. (NY → VT in #35.)
Body: 'consumed primarily by Tennessee, turning it into a T shape but Georgia and Mississippi have left it landlocked'. TN primary; AL ends up in NM bloc via the TN→GA→NM chain.
Body: 'Missouri is GONE'. Round-42 shows MO region lavender = NM (NM took the bulk, sweeping MO+AR into its bloc).
Body: 'eaten by Louisiana and Georgia'. LA primary. (LA → NM in #27.)
Body: 'Indiana is now gone'. Round-42 image shows IN region in MI's medium green.
Top of #17 was NH; body: 'New Hampshire is gone'.
Body: 'Oklahoma officially gone'. OK and its TX subtree all become NM bloc.
Body: 'Delaware gone'. MD primary by adjacency.
Body: 'Alaska has been eaten by Hawaii'.
Body: 'Utah; greedy neighbours'. CO primary.
Body: 'Connecticut cut from the map'. MA primary. (MA → VT in #37, so CT ends in VT bloc.)
Top of #23 was Wyoming; body: 'Wyoming is gone'.
Body: 'IOWA IS GONE'. MN primary; takes IA+NE+ND/SD chain.
Body: 'eaten primarily by Pennsylvania but its greedy friends Tennessee and Illinois also had a nibble'. Round-42 shows KY region in MI green — so the IL/TN portions dominated, with KY ending in MI.
Body: 'Louisiana cancelled elections, forfeit to NM'. Sweeps LA+MS subtree into NM.

Body: 'Tennessee has finally succumbed'. Round-42 shows the TN+AL region in NM lavender, which means TN's empire (incl AL) flowed into the GA→NM chain — so TN absorbed by GA in #28, then GA→NM in #30.
Body: 'Maine sacrificing its land... to Vermont'.
Body: 'Georgia is the next state to be demolished'. Round-30 image: the GA/AL/TN/SC area becomes part of the NM lavender bloc — so GA (and everything GA had absorbed: FL, TN, AL) goes to NM.
Body: 'Nevada is the next to go'. CO primary.
Body: 'goodbye NC'. MD primary; brings SC subtree along into MD.
Body: 'AZ to NME and California'. NM primary.
Body: 'Maryland has eaten' VA. VA+WV subtree into MD.
Body: 'swallowed by the Vermonster and Massivechusetts'. VT primary; takes NJ along.
Body: 'WA merged into OR → Cascadia'.
Body: 'MA merged into VT → Vermomster'. Sweeps RI+CT into VT.
Body: 'Kansas eaten by neighbours'. CO primary.
Body: 'MT swallowed by neighbours'. Round-42 shows MT region in OR/Cascadia light purple.
Body: CA split among HI/CO/NM/Cascadia. Round-42 shows central CA in CO blue — the largest contiguous slice goes to CO.
Body: 'Illinois is now eaten'. MI primary.
Body: 'Maryland crab eats Pennsylvania'. Great Maryland Empire.
